### Checklist

- [ ] SKILL.md created in `.claude/skills/<name>/`
- [ ] SKILL.md includes description, trigger, and instructions
- [ ] Skill invokes CLI for deterministic data
- [ ] Skill adds genuine qualitative analysis beyond CLI output
- [ ] VERSIONS.md updated
- [ ] README.md skills table updated
